programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A cruise aboard the Silver Cloud, from Spain's Costa Del Sol to the North Atlantic Ocean and the Gold Coast of Africa.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Brody, an entrepreneur from an established family, and his wife Hanna are looking to settle down to a quieter lifestyle in beautiful Aspen Colorado.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: This 17-deck vessel with more than 1,000 staterooms sails the Caribbean with port stops at the islands of Catalina, Tortola, Antigua, Martinique, Guadelupe and St. Martin.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The capital of Scotland, Edinburgh, offers exquisite Victorian architecture at the Balmoral Hotel and the Edinburgh Castle offers spectacular views; Geneva, Switzerland is home to the Richmond Hotel with private access to lake Geneva.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Discover Jumby Bay's multi-million dollar estates off the coast of Antigua.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Known for its natural beauty and eclectic citizens, the San Francisco Bay Area is home to some of the most creative and successful people in the United States; Vic Alavi tours estates in San Francisco.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Small villages, gorgeous coastlines and heart-stopping encounters with whales by sea kayak present a taste of what Newfoundland and Labrador have to offer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Three homes off the coast of California.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Magic rituals and witch doctors await Jonathan as he trundles through the capital city of Jakarta. Later, he seeks refuge from the bizzare superstition in one of the most secluded communities in the world.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A cruise aboard the Silver Cloud, from Spain's Costa Del Sol to the North Atlantic Ocean and the Gold Coast of Africa.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel (Asia)
programme.desc: Lynton challenges himself to climb China's massive, majestic wall and samples an imperial delicacy in Beijing.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: How to cook a traditional Peruvian quinoa; exploring the ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Hotel Meurice in Paris is the place to see and to be seen at.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Key Largo, Rays & Skates Around the World
programme.desc: Aquarius Reef Base, an undersea lab in Florida; skates and rays, including the plankton-eating manta ray and the electric torpedo ray.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Two Four Seasons luxury island resorts in the Maldives.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Tours the most opulent island homes in the Caribbean.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Scotty channels his inner child while in Japan; Carolyne indulges in some of the delicacies Lyon, France has to offer; Lynton visits some monuments in Delhi, India; Scotty explores the food and history that Vietnam's Ho Chi Minh City has to offer.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Travel the waters of Spain starting in Seville, sailing the waters of the Guadalquivir with stops in Cordoba, Cadiz and Jerez; on to the Guadiana River in Portugal to visit Vila Real and Alcoutim; and for the finale, the legendary Rock of Gibraltar.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Dallas Texas residents Joe and Arnold are looking for the perfect home in Aspen! Joe and his partner Arnold vacation in Aspen every year and they love it so much that they want to buy a home there.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: Visiting Southern California's wine country to see how it can be a fun destination.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Behind the gates of three mansions in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Two Four Seasons luxury island resorts in the Maldives.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Grenada.

programme.desc: Lynton challenges himself to climb China's massive, majestic wall and samples an imperial delicacy in Beijing.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Experience the magic of icebergs by sea kayak than the northern tip of Quirpon Island, the northernmost point of Newfoundland and Labrador.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: How to cook a traditional Peruvian quinoa; exploring the ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: After viewing a Citation Ultra, Scott Oshman shows Dallas couple Ken and Erin a King Air B200; Leonard Goldberg takes Florida entrepreneurs Rob and Aj to Miami Seaplane Base where they meet Alina Gabrishenko from Tropic Ocean Airways.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Hotel Meurice in Paris is the place to see and to be seen at.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan explores the activities of the West Coast by speeding around a racetrack, roller skating with femme fatales, and soaring high about the mountains.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: After going to the Bahamas to explore caves, Jonathan Bird travels around the world to learn about sea sponges.

programme.desc: Top 10 private islands, each one magnificent and stunning in its own way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Custom-built to navigate the Adriatic Sea and the Dalmatian Coast, the Belle de L'Adriatique sails along the Croatian coast; ports-of-call are Dubrovnik, Split, Hvar and Korcula.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Miami based Jefferson is a successful club owner, his wife, Ava, are in Aspen looking for a getaway home that might also serve as a place to start a family.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: Summer-like images come to mind when talking about Southern California, so it's time to visit wine country to see why this should be the next stop for fun destinations.
